wither_prep.title: Gather 3 Wither Skeleton Skulls and choose your Wither arena location

subtitle.translate: You have been collecting skulls since Ch06. Now you know why.

description: The nuclear age begins with a death.
The Wither yields the Nether Star.
The Nether Star is the key to what comes after.
Ancient Debris spawns at Y: 8-22 in the Nether.
Smelt to Netherite Scrap. Four Scrap + four Gold = one Netherite Ingot.
You want Netherite before the Wither fight.
Wither arena: choose a location with no structures nearby.
The Wither damages blocks within 20 blocks of its origin.
Underground works best — limits blast radius.
A bedrock-anchored position in the Nether limits it further.
The three skulls you stored in Ch06 are ready.
